pin_definitions.description: Mode Selection and External Synchronization Input Pin. Places part in forced continuous operation when tied to ground. Burst Mode enabled by floating or tying to INTVCC.
Open-Drain Power Good Output Pin. Pulled to ground when FB voltage is not within ±8% of 0.6V reference.
Switch Node Output Pin. Connect to the SW side of the external inductor.
Boosted Floating Driver Supply Pin. Connect to bootstrap capacitor.
Internal 3.3V Regulator Output Pin. Decouple with 1µF or more ceramic capacitor.
On-Time Voltage Input Pin. Sets the voltage trip point for the on-time comparator.
Signal Ground Pin. Reference ground for feedback and RT resistor.
Oscillator Frequency Program Pin. Connect external resistor to SGND to program frequency from 800kHz to 4MHz.
Output Voltage Feedback Pin. Input to error amplifier.
Error Amplifier Output and Switching Regulator Compensation Pin.
Output Voltage Tracking and Soft-Start Input Pin.
Regulator Enable Pin. Enables chip when voltage > 1.25V.
Main Power Supply Input Pins. Decouple with 10µF or more ceramic capacitor.
Power Ground Pin. Exposed pad must be soldered to PCB for electrical contact and thermal performance.

logical_pins.name: MODE/SYNC
logical_pins.description: Mode Selection and External Synchronization Input Pin. Tie to GND for forced continuous mode, float or tie to INTVCC for Burst Mode. Can be driven by an external clock.

logical_pins.name: PGOOD
logical_pins.description: Open-Drain Power Good Output Pin. Pulled to ground when FB is not within +/-8% of reference.

logical_pins.name: SW
logical_pins.description: Switch Node Output Pin. Connect to the external inductor.

logical_pins.name: BOOST
logical_pins.description: Boosted Floating Driver Supply Pin. Connect a bootstrap capacitor between this pin and SW.

logical_pins.name: INTVCC
logical_pins.description: Internal 3.3V Regulator Output Pin. Decouple with a low ESR ceramic capacitor to PGND.

logical_pins.name: VON
logical_pins.description: On-Time Voltage Input Pin. Sets the voltage trip point for the on-time comparator.

logical_pins.name: SGND
logical_pins.description: Signal Ground Pin. Reference ground for feedback, compensation, and RT resistor. In MSE package, this is the exposed pad.

logical_pins.name: RT
logical_pins.description: Oscillator Frequency Program Pin. Connect a resistor to SGND to set frequency, or tie to INTVCC for 2MHz.

logical_pins.name: FB
logical_pins.description: Output Voltage Feedback Pin. Connect to resistor divider to program output voltage.

logical_pins.name: ITH
logical_pins.description: Error Amplifier Output and Switching Regulator Compensation Pin. Tie to INTVCC for internal compensation.

logical_pins.name: TRACK
logical_pins.description: Output Voltage Tracking and Soft-Start Input Pin. Internal 1.4uA pull-up current.

logical_pins.name: RUN
logical_pins.description: Regulator Enable Pin. Above 1.25V enables, below 1V shuts down. Do not float.

logical_pins.name: VIN
logical_pins.description: Main Power Supply Input Pins. Decouple to PGND with low ESR capacitor.

logical_pins.name: PGND
logical_pins.description: Power Ground Pin. Connect to input and output bypass capacitors. In QFN package, this is the exposed pad.
